text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.9 57 

VALID_DEATH_DT_SW 

LABEL: Valid Date of Death Switch 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary’s day of death has been verified by the Social Security 
Administration (SSA) or the Railroad Retirement Board (RRB). 

SHORT NAME: V_DOD_SW 

LONG NAME: VALID_DEATH_DT_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME)
